notes: Casse Croûte (breakfast/morning) menu only captured; Déjeuner and Dîner menus not included. Some prices show two tiers (e.g. $25/$17 likely full/half portions) noted in price_note. Baguette pricing appears garbled in source ('$4.00 / $.00' and 'Additional 3') — best-effort reconstruction applied. No beverage list present in this section.

dishes.name: Baguette de Grand Central Bakery
dishes.description: Half baguette with butter and house-made jam
dishes.price_note: Complimentary baguette and butter offered with meal; half baguette with butter and jam $5. Source pricing garbled.

dishes.name: Les olives ou amandes à grignoter
dishes.description: Mixed olives marinated with pastis and orange, or almonds sautéed in olive oil with Spanish paprika and sea salt
dishes.price_note: Olives $6, almonds $9 — menu lists both under apparent combined entry; $9 used as listed price

dishes.name: Beignets au fromage de chèvre saupoudrés de sucre épicé
dishes.description: Goat cheese doughnuts tossed in spiced sugar

dishes.name: Pain au chocolat « à l'ancienne »
dishes.description: Bittersweet dark chocolate melted on baguette
dishes.price_note: Listed twice on menu (once at $10, once at $9 in desserts section); $10 used as primary price

dishes.name: Yaourt fabrication maison au miel et noix
dishes.description: House-made yogurt with organic honey and walnuts

dishes.name: Deux oeufs durs servis avec mayonaise
dishes.description: Two eggs boiled, served with mayonnaise and cornichons

dishes.name: Salade verte
dishes.description: Bibb lettuce salad with mustard and hazelnut vinaigrette

dishes.name: Salade de gemmes avec vinaigrette d'anchois et citron garnie de croutons
dishes.description: Gem lettuce, spring onions, garlic croutons and anchovy, lemon and parmesan vinaigrette

dishes.name: Œufs plats, jambon et fromage
dishes.description: Two eggs broiled with Paris ham and gruyère
dishes.price_note: Contains undercooked egg per WA health department notice

dishes.name: Pâté albigeois
dishes.description: Country style pork pâté with honey and walnuts

dishes.name: Rillettes de pork
dishes.description: Confit of pork spread served with cornichons, whole-grain and Dijon mustard
dishes.price_note: Menu lists $25/$17 — likely large/small portion; $17 used as base

dishes.name: Assiette de jambon de Bayonne
dishes.description: Air-dried ham from the French Basque country, served with cornichons
dishes.price_note: Menu lists $25/$17 — likely large/small portion; $17 used as base

dishes.name: Assiette de charcuterie
dishes.description: Chef's selection of house-made and artisan cured meats, sausages, pâtés and terrines, with cornichons
dishes.price_note: Menu lists $25/$17 — likely large/small portion; $17 used as base

dishes.name: Les tartines
dishes.description: Open-faced country bread with mustard, cornichons and one choice of charcuterie board item, or with warm chèvre, butter and cornichons

dishes.name: Assiette de fromages
dishes.description: A selection from the cheese board or by the ounce

dishes.name: Dessert du jour
dishes.description: Seasonal dessert inspired by the French countryside. Ask your server for today's choice

dishes.name: Glace ou sorbet à la boule
dishes.description: Two scoops of house-made ice cream or sorbet, served with a cookie. Ask your server for today's seasonal flavors. Ice creams are GF; VG sorbets are GF and vegan.

dishes.name: Chocolat chaud
dishes.description: Parisian-style hot chocolate made to order, served with whipped cream
